title: hieracium saxifragum subsp. diasterodes
intro: Hieracium saxifragum subsp. diasterodes, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and soothing skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Hieracium saxifragum subsp. diasterodes can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
